_note: FICTIONAL STRUCTURAL DEMONSTRATION. This is not a live verifiable credential; the issuer, signature, status list, and all numeric quality scores are PLACEHOLDERS. AUGMANITAI is descriptive linguistic-terminological research (§1), longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11), informed by ISO 704/1087/30042 (ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified — §16). No regulatory endorsement is claimed or implied. Restricted applications per §20. See DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

credentialSubject.name: AUGMANITAI 1000-Term Compendium
credentialSubject.description: Structured terminology dataset for phenomena at the human-AI interface. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). Informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 — ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified (§16).

restrictedApplications.statement: Per §20 of the Ethical Disclaimer, the terms MUST NOT be used as diagnostic labels, medical or psychological classification, legal categorization, military/intelligence classification, personnel decisions, HR screening, credit scoring, insurance assessment, state surveillance, or profiling mechanisms.

limitations: Descriptive, not normative — naming a phenomenon is not endorsement (§1)
Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11)
Bilingual (EN/DE) formulation reflects Western-European academic traditions
doesNotClaim: Legal, HR, credit-scoring, insurance, or surveillance applicability
